signals.headline: Bitcoin ETF Inflows Reach Nearly $1B Weekly as of April 22, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin ETF Inflows Reach Nearly $1B Weekly as of April 22, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
American spot Bitcoin ETFs have seen nearly one billion dollars in weekly inflows, signaling persistent large investor interest amid volatility and supporting Bitcoin's surge with institutional capital returning through ETFs.[5]
